hooks.command: printf '%s\n' 'Retrieval Protocol (CLAUDE.md, MANDATORY): before taking any non-trivial task, consult the knowledge base first — RAG (python3 scripts/rag_search.py "<query>") -> wiki/index.md -> ontology/ -> prior pieces. Reflexive grep on a concept is a process bug. Close-the-Loop (RAG re-index) runs automatically on git merge via the post-merge hook.'
